---
listing:
  categories: true
  contents:
  - '*.qmd'
  feed: true
  filter-ui: false
  sort: date desc
  sort-ui: false
  type: default
page-layout: full
title: Blog
title-block-bannerrR: false
---

<!-- Add an optional intro below the listing -->

Welcome to my corner of the internet. I (plan to) write about random topics here.
